message:
🧹 Consolidate ~70 duplicate time constants into lib/constants/time.ts (#10148)

* 🧹 Consolidate ~70 duplicate time constants into lib/constants/time.ts

Fixes #10147

Seven time-unit constants (MS_PER_SECOND, SECONDS_PER_MINUTE,
MINUTES_PER_HOUR, HOURS_PER_DAY, MS_PER_MINUTE, MS_PER_HOUR,
MS_PER_DAY) were defined locally in ~40 source files. Extract to
a shared module and replace all module-level duplicates with imports.

39 files changed, net -89 lines. Test files and function-body
locals left untouched for isolation.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* fix: remove unused time constant imports (TS6133)

CI caught unused imports in 8 files — base constants (MS_PER_SECOND,
SECONDS_PER_MINUTE, etc.) were imported but only derived constants
(MS_PER_MINUTE, MS_PER_HOUR, MS_PER_DAY) were actually used.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+/**
+ * Shared time-unit constants used across hooks, cards, and demo data.
+ *
+ * Consolidates the ~70 duplicate `MS_PER_*` / `SECONDS_PER_*` definitions
+ * that were scattered across the codebase.
+ */
+
+export const MS_PER_SECOND = 1_000
+export const SECONDS_PER_MINUTE = 60
+export const MINUTES_PER_HOUR = 60
+export const HOURS_PER_DAY = 24
+
+export const MS_PER_MINUTE = MS_PER_SECOND * SECONDS_PER_MINUTE
+export const MS_PER_HOUR = MS_PER_MINUTE * MINUTES_PER_HOUR
+export const MS_PER_DAY = MS_PER_HOUR * HOURS_PER_DAY

@@ -3,6 +3,8 @@

@@ -163,7 +165,6 @@ function truncateMessage(message: string, maxLength = 100): string {
 }

 const SECONDS_PER_HOUR = 3_600
 const SECONDS_PER_DAY = 86_400
